# iltumio.dev

> Manuel Tumiati — Web3 CTO & Blockchain Engineer

## About
Personal website and blog of Manuel Tumiati, CTO at Zyphe Inc.
Specializing in blockchain architecture, smart contract development,
self-sovereign identity (SSI), and zero-knowledge proofs.

## Content
- Homepage: Professional profile, current roles, skills & technologies
- Blog: Technical articles on Web3, blockchain, digital identity, and SSI

## Blog Posts
- /blog/eudi-wallet-ssi-comparison — Analysis comparing the EU Digital Identity Wallet against self-sovereign identity principles
- /blog/welcome-to-my-blog — Introduction and blog overview

## Contact
- GitHub: https://github.com/iltumio
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/manuel-tumiati/
- Twitter: https://x.com/iltumio
